_README: Team-shared repo settings. Hooks (db_write_guard PreToolUse, session/ticket-index SessionStart, ticket-index-regen PostToolUse) are wired by the ticketwright plugin manifest and run from ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} — NOT duplicated here, so they don't double-fire. This file carries the plugin enablement, a read-only permission baseline (the db_write_guard hook still gates destructive SQL even when a CLI is allowed), and the stack statusline.
